title: Set Up Organization
business_purpose: Create the first organization record and its primary domain boundary.
primary_user_context: A platform setup owner configuring the first tenant.
user_goal: Enter organization details and complete first-time setup safely.
success_outcome: Organization setup finishes once and returns a completed state.

visibility_rules.description: Visible before platform setup is completed.

record_scope_behavior.description: This flow runs once before tenant-scoped application access begins.

data_sources.label: Setup form input
data_sources.description: Collects organization slug, name, status, and domain from user input.

data_sources.label: Setup result state
data_sources.description: Returns created organization and domain after successful setup.

api_routes.description: Create the initial organization and primary domain in one setup operation.

empty_data_behavior.title: No setup yet
empty_data_behavior.message: The platform has not been set up yet.

validation_rules.message: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

empty_state.title: Ready to begin
empty_state.message: Fill in the setup form to create your organization.

loading_state.title: Loading
loading_state.message: Please wait while this screen loads.

error_state.title: Something went wrong
error_state.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact support.

permission_denied_state.title: Setup unavailable
permission_denied_state.message: Setup is not available after initialization is completed.

forbidden_behaviors: No fake data may be shown in this screen.
No placeholder actions may be presented to users.
No hardcoded roles, units, or campuses are allowed.
No cross-organization data exposure is allowed.
No out-of-scope frontend or backend behavior may be implemented from this contract alone.
Do not guess organization details or auto-fill business identifiers without user input.
